assertions.text: Agent recommends extracting networking code to a dedicated Gradle module as preparation step
assertions.evidence: Phase 1 is entirely about extracting to a :network module. 'two-phase migration: first extract the networking code into a dedicated Gradle module, then perform the Retrofit-to-Ktor swap.'

assertions.text: ProGuard/R8 keep rules referencing service classes are flagged as hidden consumers
assertions.evidence: Dedicated 'ProGuard / R8 — hidden consumers to flag' section. 'These are hidden consumers: they encode knowledge of the concrete networking implementation inside the app module's build configuration.'

assertions.text: Agent identifies Retrofit/OkHttp-specific artifacts (converters, interceptors, authenticators) that need to be replaced with Ktor equivalents
assertions.evidence: Full table mapping Retrofit+OkHttp concepts to Ktor equivalents including Converter.Factory, CallAdapter.Factory, interceptors, Authenticator, HttpLoggingInterceptor. Separate 'Key dependency changes' section with remove/add lists.

assertions.text: Migration plan includes a PR breakdown (e.g., PR 1: module extraction, PR 2: Ktor implementation, PR 3: cleanup)
assertions.evidence: 'Recommended PR Breakdown' section with PR 1 (module extraction), PR 2 (Ktor implementation), PR 3 (cleanup). Each with risk assessment.
